data.title: Update project docs to reflect testing philosophy unification
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the unified testing philosophy. This includes updating CLAUDE.md references to the behavioral testing standard (now 5-rule instead of 4-rule), and any other existing docs that reference the old parallel rule sets.
**Why**: After the epic completes, documentation that references "4-rule standard" or the old parallel Behavioral Test Requirement section will be stale and misleading for future agents.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md references to the behavioral testing standard from 4-rule to 5-rule; update any other existing docs that reference the old structure
- OUT: Creating new documentation files; changes to the standard or skill files themselves (those are sibling stories)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, all existing project documentation accurately references the unified 5-rule behavioral testing standard
- When this story is complete, no existing documentation references the removed Behavioral Test Requirement section in implementation-plan
